steps.prompt: This is an XOR gate — a tricky one! What do you think happens when you turn the top switch on?
steps.feedback: Fan spins! XOR works with just one. Now turn the bottom switch on too — what do you think happens?

steps.prompt: Now turn the bottom switch on.
steps.feedback: Fan stops! Both on and it stops — XOR only works when the switches are different. Turn the bottom switch off.
Fan spins again! XOR needs the switches to be different — one on, one off. Same means stop!
